title: Flea Treatment in University Heights, Bronx | $350-$650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in University Heights, Bronx. Effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$650 service!
intro: University Heights residents facing flea infestations need fast, effective solutions to protect their families and pets. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout University Heights, targeting fleas at every life stage to eliminate current problems and prevent future outbreaks. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of flea control in Bronx apartments and homes.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served University Heights for years with proven flea elimination methods that are safe for children and pets. Our licensed professionals use EPA-approved treatments and offer flexible scheduling to accommodate the busy lives of University Heights residents, with most treatments completed in a single visit.
localContext: University Heights' mix of pre-war walk-ups, apartment buildings near Bronx Community College, and residential homes along tree-lined streets can all experience flea problems, especially in buildings with shared walls or outdoor spaces. The neighborhood's proximity to Hall of Fame Playground and other green spaces means pets often bring fleas indoors, making prompt professional treatment essential.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in University Heights?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in University Heights range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home or apartment, the severity of the infestation, and whether multiple rooms require treatment. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work in my University Heights apartment?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments show significant results within 24-48 hours, with adult fleas dying quickly after application. However, complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as eggs and pupae hatch and are exposed to the treatment. We often recommend a follow-up visit to ensure all life stages are eliminated.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my University Heights home during flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, we recommend that all residents and pets vacate the premises for 2-4 hours during and immediately after treatment to allow products to dry and settle. You'll receive specific instructions based on the treatment method used, and we'll let you know exactly when it's safe to return.

faqs.question: Can fleas come back after treatment in University Heights buildings?
faqs.answer: While our treatment is highly effective, re-infestation can occur if fleas are reintroduced by pets, from neighboring units in multi-family buildings, or from outdoor areas. We provide guidance on preventive measures and offer follow-up treatments if needed. Treating your pets simultaneously with veterinary flea products is essential for long-term success.
